summary: While the role perfectly aligns with your strengths in procedural, protocol-driven work and minimal math requirements, the extreme physical and emotional demands pose a significant threat to your long-term wellbeing. The high-stakes environment—where minor errors carry life-threatening consequences—creates a high-stress atmosphere that frequently leads to burnout and chronic injury. Furthermore, the mandatory weekend rotations and the physical exhaustion associated with the role make it difficult to maintain the predictable, sustainable personal life you prioritize.
